title: AutoFisher
description: Automated fishing mod that reduces repetitive clicking fatigue with HUD statistics and continuous GUI operation
body:
AutoFisher is a Minecraft (Fabric) mod that automates the fishing process.

**The main goal is to help you get less tired from repetitive clicking.**

## 🔧 Key Features

- **Automatic rod recasting** - Detects when fish is caught and automatically recasts your fishing rod
- **Full command control** - Manage all settings via chat commands (use `/autofisher help` for full list)
- **Lightweight and efficient** - Minimal performance impact on your game
- **Easy toggle** - Quickly enable/disable automation as needed
- **Mini-HUD display** - Shows session time and fishing statistics on screen
- **GUI-independent operation** - Continues fishing even when inventory, ESC menu, or chests are open

## 📋 How to Use

1. Install Fabric Loader and Fabric API
2. Place the mod file in your mods folder
3. Launch Minecraft 1.21.4
4. Use `/autofisher` commands to control the mod
5. Cast your fishing rod and let the mod handle the rest!

## ⚙️ Requirements

- Minecraft 1.21.4
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API
